title: claude2 tile data
description: Data for the bundled `claude2` tile: one niri desktop running TWO Claude sessions, stacked. Feed it as the module's `exec` stdout (JSON) or static `text`. The shared `shortcut` sits in a left gutter; each entry of `sessions` becomes one session block (status + folder + unpushed, then its title). Per-session fields mirror the single `claude` tile.

shortcut.description: MOCK. The niri desktop's shortcut number, shown big in the shared left gutter.

active.description: Whether this is the focused/active niri desktop. When true, the tile gets the accent 'card'.

sessions.description: The Claude sessions on this desktop (1 or 2). Each renders as a stacked block: status indicator + folder + unpushed badge, then a title line.

state.description: REAL (sessions.state). Drives this session's <status> indicator: working=Claude mascot in deep orange, prompt=blinking '?' (and the WHOLE tile pulses if ANY session is prompt), idle=fade bar (see idle_level) + idle_ago, shell=mascot in electric cyan.

idle_level.description: REAL-derived. Only meaningful when state=idle: 0=just idled (bright) .. 6=>60min (dim).

idle_ago.description: REAL-derived. Shown beside the idle bar (e.g. '12m'). Keep it short.

folder.description: REAL (basename of sessions.cwd). The session's working-directory name.

title.description: MOCK. The session's window title, shown on its own line (tickers if it overflows).

unpushed.description: MOCK. Unpushed commit count; shown as ↑N after the folder (hidden when 0 or idle).
